selfcheck.answer: El instante t y el futuro
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Explorer selfcheck Q0 on S32: question «Una ventana half-open [t−w, t) excluye:» → option[3] «El instante t y el futuro». Supported by theory «numéricas/categóricas/texto» and iDo S32-T1-A-DEMO. I picked the stem that matches the taught contract (pyramid/risk, fail-closed, no auto-fraud labels).

Explorer selfcheck Q1 on S32: question «Transform antes de fit debe:» → option[1] «Fallar de forma explícita». Supported by theory «missing indicators, escalamiento y encoding» and iDo S32-T1-B-DEMO. I picked the stem that matches the taught contract (pyramid/risk, fail-closed, no auto-fraud labels).

Explorer selfcheck Q2 on S32: question «Overlap de entidades entre train y test:» → option[2] «Es leakage de identidad». Supported by theory «shared contact/address, distance y graph features» and iDo S32-T2-A-DEMO. I picked the stem that matches the taught contract (pyramid/risk, fail-closed, no auto-fraud labels).

Explorer selfcheck Q3 on S32: question «Un nombre de feature con 'label' o 'decision':» → option[0] «Es red flag de leakage». Supported by theory «ventanas y frecuencia» and iDo S32-T2-B-DEMO. I picked the stem that matches the taught contract (pyramid/risk, fail-closed, no auto-fraud labels).
